my_thoughts: 'When then have I told you that my head alone cannot be cut off?'—the 'alone' is interesting. As if to say 'of course you can, that's what heads are for.' The absence of fear is the argument. No Stoic speech needed, just this calm correction. That's the teaching. Episode complete—tyrant has nothing left.
accumulated_insight: T4 (Final): Final escalation—annihilation. Response accepts mortality of head but points out he never claimed immortality. Clean closure. The tyrant has nothing left. Four-turn arc: secret → chains → prison → death. Each escalation met with same move: 'you can't touch what matters.' The absence of fear is the argument.
visible_response: When, then, have I told you that my head alone cannot be cut off?
